import subprocess
out = []

# Check nvidia-smi
r = subprocess.run(['nvidia-smi', '--query-gpu=memory.used,memory.total', '--format=csv,noheader'], capture_output=True, text=True)
out.append('GPU Memory: ' + r.stdout.strip())

# Check what processes are using GPU
r2 = subprocess.run(['nvidia-smi', '--query-compute-apps=pid,used_memory,process_name', '--format=csv,noheader'], capture_output=True, text=True)
out.append('GPU Processes: ' + (r2.stdout.strip() or 'None'))

result = chr(10).join(out)
